title: Yariyb #3402
definition:
Jarib = "he contends"

 1) a son of Simeon
 2) one of the chief men of Israel who returned from exile with Ezra
 3) son of Jozadak and a priest of the house of Jeshua who married a
    foreign wife and was compelled by Ezra to put her away
